cited_text: So Keller had the idea of, we're going to go to African countries and we are going to help or deliver medicines to these small villages and villages. response_text: Zipline's real moat: **seven years of real-world autonomous flight data** gathered delivering blood and medicine in Africa — cutting maternal mortality by 90-95% in some countries.
